title: SQS Standalone Queue Config
description: Schema for standalone SQS queue configuration files placed in configs/stacks/sqs/. Template variables (e.g., {{WORKLOAD_NAME}}, {{DEPLOYMENT_NAMESPACE}}) are supported in string fields and resolved at runtime.

name.description: Queue name. Supports template variables such as {{WORKLOAD_NAME}} and {{DEPLOYMENT_NAMESPACE}}.

description.description: Human-readable description of the queue's purpose.

type.description: Queue type. FIFO queues require the queue name to end with .fifo suffix.

visibility_timeout_seconds.description: Time in seconds that a message is invisible after being received. Default: 30.

message_retention_period_days.description: Number of days messages are retained in the queue. Default: 4.

delay_seconds.description: Delivery delay in seconds for messages sent to the queue. Default: 0.

dead_letter_queue.description: Dead letter queue configuration. When present, a DLQ is created and associated with the main queue.

max_receive_count.description: Number of times a message can be received before being sent to the DLQ. Default: 5.

message_retention_period_days.description: Number of days messages are retained in the DLQ. Default: 14.

ssm_parameters.description: SSM Parameter Store export configuration. When present, queue ARN and URL are published to SSM.

namespace.description: SSM path prefix for publishing queue ARN and URL. Supports template variables.
